category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tool for development of Graal projects; official repo README https://github.com/graalvm/mx says mx manages development of primarily Java code including build, test, run, and update tasks.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mx; official repository https://github.com/graalvm/mx uses graalvm/mx and README refers to mx.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory and README with usage and concepts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/graalvm/mx, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repo README identify mx as a command-line development/build tool for Graal and primarily Java code.
